name: Hidden View Farm
description: A 100+ acre English-country garden estate just outside Annapolis in Crownsville, with six distinctive outdoor ceremony and reception settings — the Koi Pond, the Gardens, the Meadow, the Manor House exterior and an Amish-built barn — threaded with hidden garden pathways and South River views. Styles range from formal to whimsical; it's a relaxed, greenery-rich garden venue rather than a ballroom, with couples free to start setting up the afternoon before.

price.note: Venue space starting at $1,000; custom quotes provided on a private tour. Pulled 2026-06-07 from hiddenviewfarm.org — a starting figure only, well under the $7,000 venue limit, but the actual day-of-week / package total needs a quote.

availability.notes: No public availability calendar — specific 2026 Saturday availability (late-Aug / early-Oct targets) must be confirmed by inquiry / tour. Outdoor garden venue.

scoutNote: Strong open-vendor garden fit and the most budget-friendly of the shortlist — six outdoor garden settings, English-country styling, ~20 min from Annapolis. Meets the no-required-vendor must-have: caterers are recommended, not required. VERIFIED: starting price, catering/vendor policy, garden spaces, planning support. UNKNOWN: confirmed guest capacity (not published — the gardens + barn read comfortably for 40-60, confirm on tour) and 2026 Saturday availability (no public calendar).
